MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT LEHMAN BROTHERS, INC.'S APPLICATION FOR TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER AND OSC RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION.
APPEARANCES: Peter N. Larson, Esq., 415-626-3939 of Jones Day for Plaintiff and Moving Party; R. James Slaughter, Esq., 415-391-5400 of Keker & Van Nest for Defendant and Opposing Party.
RULING: OSC Off calendar per moving party; TRO will lapse. Prevailing party to prepare order. (302/REQ). Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR #2647

Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction Filed By Plaintiff Lehman Brothers, Inc.
Off Calendar Oct-17-2005 Continued To Oct-31-05 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF LEHMAN BROTHERS, INC.'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION.
APPEARANCES: Peter N. Larson, Esq., 415-875-5700 of Jones & Day for Plaintiff and Moving Party. No other appearance in this matter.
RULING: Request for continuance made in open court. The Court finds good cause and the matter is continued to 10/31/05 at 10:30 A.M. TRO remains in effect. Counsel to prepare order stating forth representation made to the Court and the continued hearing date.
Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR #2647
